get.summary: Gets all entities associated with the user.
get.description: Uses the bproles of the bearer token to identify owned roles

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Zero-based page index (0..N)

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

BusinessPartnerType.description:
| Value                        | Description                                                   |
| ---------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- |
| GOVERNMENTAL_INSTITUTION     | Governmental institutions like JPD or ASTRA                   |
| BUSINESS                     | Business entities and corporations                            |
| INDIVIDUAL                   | Individual persons                                            |
| UNKNOWN                      | Unknown type (legacy partners, will be classified)            |

TrustOnboardingSubmissionRequest.description: A request to onboard a new trust entity.

entityName.description: The official name of the entity.

entityAddress.description: The official address of the entity.

entityEmail.description: The official email address of the entity.

contactPerson.description: The contact person for the entity.

registryIds.description: A map of registry identifiers for the entity. The key is the registry name (e.g., 'uid') and the value is the identifier.

isRegisteredInCommercialRegister.description: Whether or not the entity is registered in the commercial register

dids.description: Selected DIDs to be onboarded initially

requestedPartnerType.description: The requested partner type. Can be different than the current partner type of the business partner.

isGovActor.description: Deprecated: use businessPartnerType instead. Will be removed with EID-5292

isRegisteredInCommercialRegister.description: Whether or not the entity is registered in the commercial register

name.description: Unique name of the entity to be created. Can not be changed once created. Allowed are letters, digits, spaces, and most special characters.

contactEmailAddress.description: Email address how the controller of the entity can be reached. Ideally a shared mailbox.

id.description: Key of the entity under which it is registered with ePortal

isVerified.description: Was there a successful trust onboarding

payedForDIDSlots.description: Number of DID slots the user payed for already

ObjectLimits.description: This shows the limits which are enacted for a given object category.

name.description: Unique name of the partner to be created. Can not be changed once created. Allowed are letters, digits, spaces, and most special characters.

contactPhone.description: Phone number under which the controller of the partner can be reached.

contactEmail.description: Email address how the controller of the partner can be reached. Ideally a shared mailbox.

id.description: Key of the partner under which it is registered with ePortal

payedForDIDSlots.description: Number of DID slots the user paid for already

uid.description: Enterprise identification number of the partner

trustVerificationStatus.description: Aggregated state of the trust process for this business partner

maxDateForTrustVerificationStatus.description: Time limit, if necessary, of the current aggregated state of the trust process

BusinessPartnerTrustStatus.description:
Defines the current aggregated state of the trust process.
    @startuml
    [*] --> NOT_VERIFIED

    NOT_VERIFIED -[#green]-> VERIFICATION_STARTED

    VERIFICATION_STARTED -[#green]-> VERIFICATION_IN_PROGRESS

    VERIFICATION_IN_PROGRESS -[#orange]-> INFORMATION_REQUESTED
    VERIFICATION_IN_PROGRESS -[#green]-> VERIFIED
    VERIFICATION_IN_PROGRESS -[#red]-> NOT_VERIFIED

    INFORMATION_REQUESTED -[#green]-> VERIFIED
    INFORMATION_REQUESTED -[#red]-> NOT_VERIFIED

    VERIFIED -[#green]-> RE_VERIFICATION_STARTED

    RE_VERIFICATION_STARTED -[#green]-> RE_VERIFICATION_IN_PROGRESS

    RE_VERIFICATION_IN_PROGRESS -[#orange]-> INFORMATION_REQUESTED
    RE_VERIFICATION_IN_PROGRESS -[#green]-> VERIFIED
    RE_VERIFICATION_IN_PROGRESS -[#red]-> NOT_VERIFIED
    @enduml

trustOnboardingSubmissionId.description: Id of the trust onboarding submission this document belongs to.

owningBusinessPartner.description: Id of the business partner this file belongs to.

submittedAt.description: Time and date when this document was submitted.
